_comment_status: Being phased out. All slash commands SHOULD reach the Brain (which has intent tools + command_conventions prompt). Rules below are kept only for business modules that have not yet migrated to IntentSpec. New modules MUST NOT add entries here.
_comment_migration: job_profile / job_greet / job_chat have all migrated to IntentSpec tools — their rules are removed. Remaining entries are for email / intel which still use coarse handle_intent; remove them once those modules adopt IntentSpec. /help is handled by Brain system prompt (prompt_contract.py _section_command_conventions).
